basic_details.job_title: IIM Guwahati Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati (IIM Guwahati) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Management Guwahati has released the official notification for Assistant Librarian posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per GOI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) with NET/SLET/SET qualified.
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized University/Institution with NET/SLET/SET qualified. Overall 8 years of experience in academic, institutional, or research libraries is desirable. Knowledge of library automation software, digital library systems, and e-resource management. Proficiency in MS Office and information management systems.

salary_details.details: Pay and benefits in Paylevel 08 under 7th CPC.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Guwahati Assistant Librarian Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 06-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Librarian post at IIM Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Assistant Librarian position at IIM Guwahati is June 06, 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Librarian role?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Master's Degree in Library and Information Science (MLISc) from a recognized university or institution, along with NET/SLET/SET qualification. Experience in academic or research libraries is also desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Assistant Librarian position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Librarian post is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Librarian post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Librarian position will be as per Pay Level 08 under the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), along with applicable benefits.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Assistant Librarian recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply online through the official website of IIM Guwahati or the provided application link. Ensure all details are filled correctly and required documents are uploaded before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates should check the official notification for any updates regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Assistant Librarian position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Assistant Librarian position at IIM Guwahati is contract-based.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIM Guwahati offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the prevailing Government of India rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for the Assistant Librarian role?
faq.answer: Candidates with at least 8 years of overall experience in academic, institutional, or research libraries are considered desirable for this role.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
